privileged_info_summary: The Ebola_Check dataset contains 150 synthetically generated records with case IDs formatted as CASE_001 through CASE_150. Four records (CASE_015, CASE_042, CASE_088, CASE_101) contain deliberate temporal logic errors: CASE_015 and CASE_088 have DateOnset occurring before DateExposure (negative incubation periods), while CASE_042 and CASE_101 have DateReport occurring before DateOnset (reported before illness onset). The data is generated during task setup using PowerShell random functions and stored at C:\Users\Docker\Documents\EpiInfoData\Ebola_Check.csv. The expected output is an HTML file listing only these four error records with variables GlobalID, DateExposure, DateOnset, and DateReport.
